name: Puffy Omelet Squares
recipeIngredient: 14-1/2 ounces Can stewed Tomatoes, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the baking dish by spraying with Pam and setting aside.
2. For the omelet mixture, beat egg yolks, onion powder, salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper for about 4 minutes or until thick and lemon colored.
3. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form (tips fall over).
4. Fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
5. Spread the egg mixture evenly into the prepared baking dish.
6. Bake at 350°F in a preheated oven for 22-25 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Meanwhile, combine undrained tomatoes, diced zucchini (1/2 cup), and 1/8 teaspoon pepper in a saucepan. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
8. Cover and simmer about 5 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
9. Simmer uncovered for an additional 10-12 minutes until desired consistency is reached.
10. To serve, cut the omelet into quarters and top with the sauce.
